pos_white_socks: white socks for feet, athletic or dress socks
neg_white_socks: a non-socks fashion product, like a shirt, pants, dress, or accessory
colored socks (black, gray, navy, etc.) — not white
shoes, sandals, sneakers, or other non-sock footwear

cascade_form: F+J+R cascade: (a) image-side dase white-socks contrastive margin (drop-only); (b) pair-side dase product text-emb × image-cap emb cos sim (drop-only); Stage 1 CTAS uncertain pairs; Stage 2 q14.sql verbatim with staging-driven JOIN; BQ AI.IF/SCORE prompts unchanged

calibration.method: AI.GENERATE_BOOL on Q14 fit prompt + thinking_budget=0

baseline.sql:
SELECT
  ARRAY_AGG(
    ARRAY_FIRST(SPLIT(ARRAY_LAST(SPLIT(images.uri, '/')), '.'))
    ORDER BY AI.SCORE(
      ('The image ', images.ref, ' fits the description: ',
       styles_details.productDisplayName, ' ',
       styles_details.productDescriptors.description.value),
      connection_id => 'us.connection',
      endpoint => 'gemini-2.5-flash'
    ) ASC
    LIMIT 1
  )[0] AS id
FROM fashion_product_images.STYLES_DETAILS as styles_details
JOIN EXTERNAL_OBJECT_TRANSFORM(TABLE `fashion_product_images.IMAGES`, ['SIGNED_URL']) as images
  ON AI.IF(
    ('The image ', images.ref, ' fits the description: ',
     styles_details.productDisplayName, ' ',
     styles_details.productDescriptors.description.value),
    connection_id => 'us.connection',
    endpoint => 'gemini-2.5-flash'
  )
WHERE styles_details.price < 130
  AND AI.IF(
    ('The image ', images.ref, ' depicts white socks'),
    connection_id => 'us.connection',
    endpoint => 'gemini-2.5-flash'
  )
GROUP BY
  styles_details.id,
  styles_details.productDisplayName,
  styles_details.productDescriptors.description

cost_breakdown.n_llm_calls_method: n_total_pairs × 3 AI calls (white-socks AI.IF + fit AI.IF + fit AI.SCORE)

cascade.method: F+J+R cascade with double dase prefilter: image-side white-socks drop + pair-side cos-sim drop; staging pair table drives Stage 2; BQ AI.IF/SCORE prompts unchanged

stage1_ctas.sql:

stage2_run.sql:
SELECT
  ARRAY_AGG(
    ARRAY_FIRST(SPLIT(ARRAY_LAST(SPLIT(i.uri, '/')), '.'))
    ORDER BY AI.SCORE(
      ('The image ', i.ref, ' fits the description: ',
       p.productDisplayName, ' ',
       p.productDescriptors.description.value),
      connection_id => 'us.connection',
      endpoint => 'gemini-2.5-flash'
    ) ASC
    LIMIT 1
  )[0] AS id
FROM fashion_product_images.q14_uncertain_pairs sp
JOIN fashion_product_images.STYLES_DETAILS p ON p.id = sp.product_id
JOIN EXTERNAL_OBJECT_TRANSFORM(TABLE `fashion_product_images.IMAGES`, ['SIGNED_URL']) i
  ON CAST(ARRAY_FIRST(SPLIT(ARRAY_LAST(SPLIT(i.uri, '/')), '.')) AS INT64) = sp.image_id
WHERE p.price < 130
  AND AI.IF(
    ('The image ', i.ref, ' depicts white socks'),
    connection_id => 'us.connection',
    endpoint => 'gemini-2.5-flash'
  )
  AND AI.IF(
    ('The image ', i.ref, ' fits the description: ',
     p.productDisplayName, ' ',
     p.productDescriptors.description.value),
    connection_id => 'us.connection',
    endpoint => 'gemini-2.5-flash'
  )
GROUP BY
  p.id,
  p.productDisplayName,
  p.productDescriptors.description
